hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' < /dev/stdin) && case "$file" in *.js|*.ts|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.jsx|*.tsx) pnpm exec eslint --rule 'unused-imports/no-unused-imports: off' "$file" || true; pnpm exec oxfmt --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true;; *.md|*.json|*.yaml|*.yml) pnpm exec oxfmt --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
